POSSIBLE TORNADO REPORTED BY THE PUBLIC AS IT DEVELOPED BEHIND THEIR HOME AND MOVED EAST. THE REPORT WAS RELAYED TO THE ELBA POLICE DEPT. THIS REPORT WAS UTLIMATELY FORWARDED TO NWS A FEW HOURS LATER. NO REPORTS OF DAMAGE WERE RECEIVED.
